zh.lifeSummary: 當William Barker II於大約1348年出生在英國史洛普爾時，他的父親Roger Le Barker27歲，母親Alice Seisdon31歲。他於1373年與Margery Whorwood在英國史洛普爾沃費爾德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1412年在英國英格蘭史洛普爾布利其諾斯享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Barker II于大约1348年出生在英国史洛普爾时，他的父亲Roger Le Barker27岁，母亲Alice Seisdon31岁。他于1373年与Margery Whorwood在英国史洛普爾沃費爾德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1412年在英国英格兰史洛普爾布利其諾斯享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Barker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a tanner of leather, from Middle English barkere ‘tanner’, tree bark having been used as the tanning agent.

English: occupational name for a shepherd, from Middle English berker, bercher (Old French berchier, bercher, berkier, berker, Late Latin berbicarius, from berbex ‘ram’, genitive berbicis). With the change of -ar- to -er- in Middle English, this became indistinguishable from the preceding name (see 1 above).
Americanized form of German   Berger   or   Barger  .

variants.name: Berger
meanings: German, Dutch, Swedish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): topographic name for someone who lived in the mountains or hills (see   Berg  ). The surname of German origin is also found in many other European countries, e.g. in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Russia, Poland, Czechia, Hungary, and Croatia, and Slovenia, often as a translation into German of corresponding Slavic topographic names or surnames. As a Jewish name it is mainly artificial. Compare   Bargar  ,   Barger  ,   Barker  ,   Barrier  , and   Barriger  .
French: occupational name from Old French bergier ‘shepherd’ (from Late Latin berbicarius, from berbex ‘ram’). It is also found in England, as a surname of Huguenot origin. Compare Shepard .
Norwegian: habitational name from any of various farms so named with the plural of   Berg   ‘mountain’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When William Barker II was born about 1348, in Shropshire, England, his father, Roger Le Barker, was 27 and his mother, Alice Seisdon, was 31. He married Margery Whorwood in 1373, in Worfield, Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died about 1412, in Bridgnorth, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Barker II est né environ 1348, à Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Roger Le Barker, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Alice Seisdon, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Margery Whorwood en 1373, à Worfield, Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé environ 1412, à Bridgnorth, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Barker II um 1348 in Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Le Barker 27 und seine Mutter Alice Seisdon 31. Er hat 1373 in Worfield, Shropshire, England Margery Whorwood geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb um 1412 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Bridgnorth, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Barker II è nato il circa 1348 nel Shropshire, England, il suo padre, Roger Le Barker, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Alice Seisdon, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Margery Whorwood nel 1373, nel Worfield, Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì circa 1412, nel Bridgnorth, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Barker IIが約1348年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアで生まれた時，父Roger Le Barkerは27歳，母Alice Seisdonは31歳であった。1373年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアウオルフィールドでMargery Whorwoodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は約1412年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアブリドグノースで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Barker II(이)가 대략 1348년 영국 슈럽실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Le Barker(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Seisdon(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1373년 영국 슈럽실르 워필드에서 Margery Whorwood(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1412년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 브리지노르스에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Barker II родился около 1348 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger Le Barker было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Seisdon, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Whorwood в 1373 г. в местности ворфиелд, шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер около 1412 г. в местности бриджнорт, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет.
